name: Step-Up SIP Calculator
metaTitle: Step-Up SIP Calculator — See Real Returns with Annual SIP Increase | c7xai
metaDescription: Project your Step-Up SIP returns after inflation and tax. See how a yearly SIP increase boosts your corpus. Client-side, no PII.
shortDescription: Step-up SIP: more invests, bigger corpus

faq.question: What is a Step-Up SIP?
faq.answer: A Step-Up SIP automatically increases your monthly investment by a fixed percentage each year, typically matching your salary increment. For example, starting at ₹10,000/month with a 10% annual step-up means you invest ₹11,000/month in year 2, ₹12,100/month in year 3, and so on.

faq.question: How much does a Step-Up SIP increase returns?
faq.answer: A 10% annual step-up on a ₹10,000 SIP over 20 years at 12% returns can increase your final corpus by 40-60% compared to a regular SIP. This happens because you invest significantly more capital over time as your income grows.

faq.question: What step-up percentage should I choose?
faq.answer: Most investors choose 5-10% annual step-up, aligned with their expected salary increment. A 10% step-up is popular as it matches typical Indian salary growth of 8-12% per year.

faq.question: Is Step-Up SIP better than regular SIP?
faq.answer: Step-Up SIP generates a larger corpus because you invest more each year. However, it requires higher annual outflows. If your income grows steadily, Step-Up SIP is superior as it matches your increasing investment capacity with higher contributions.

howToSteps.name: Set step-up percentage
howToSteps.text: Choose how much to increase your SIP each year (default: 10%)

howToSteps.name: Set expected return rate
howToSteps.text: Adjust the expected annual return (default: 12% for NIFTY)

howToSteps.name: Compare with regular SIP
howToSteps.text: See how much more you accumulate with Step-Up vs regular SIP
